projectDescription: Keyboard-driven navigation for macOS - Navigate and click without touching your mouse
keyFeatures: Recursive Grid Navigation - Coordinate-based screen navigation that works everywhere
Grid Mode - Quick coarse navigation with coordinate grid
Hints Mode - Accessibility-driven clickable element labeling
Vim-Style Scrolling - Familiar j/k/gg/G keyboard scrolling
Direct Mouse Actions - Left/right/middle click, drag & drop via keybindings
Full CLI Control - IPC-based command-line interface for automation
Per-App Exclusions - Disable Neru in specific applications
publicApiSurface: neru launch - Start the daemon
neru hints - Show clickable hints mode
neru grid - Show coordinate grid mode
neru recursive_grid - Start recursive grid navigation
neru scroll - Enable vim-style scrolling
neru action left_click - Perform left click at cursor
neru action right_click - Perform right click at cursor
neru action middle_click - Perform middle click at cursor
neru action mouse_down - Hold mouse button
neru action mouse_up - Release mouse button
neru action move_mouse - Move to absolute coordinates
neru action move_mouse_relative - Move by relative delta
neru services install - Install launchd service
neru services uninstall - Remove launchd service
neru services start - Start the service
neru services stop - Stop the service
neru services status - Check service status
neru config reload - Reload configuration
neru config dump - Show current configuration
neru status - Show daemon status
neru start - Resume paused daemon
neru stop - Pause daemon
neru idle - Cancel active mode
neru toggle-screen-share - Toggle overlay in screen sharing
neru doctor - Check component health
neru profile - Show profiling instructions
neru metrics - Display metrics
